TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Sblaiq, title = Sblaiq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sblaiq} }

S.FORM: = Sblaiq = Sblaiq mu. Dhuq sngayan jiyax ka sayang, mqaras bi ka lnglungan mu, yasa tduwa pqita ku laqi laqi, mseupu nami mhrapas ni mhulis. Yaku o mdrumuc bi qmeepah kdjiyax. Dhuq sngayan jiyax do musa ku tuhuy laqi ni laqi laqi, malu bi ka jiyax saw nii sblaiq balay wah.
S.PHON: = sblaiq = sblaiq mu. dħuq sŋajan ɟijax ka sajaŋ, mqaɾas bi ka lŋluŋan mu, jasa tduwa pqita ku laqi laqi, msəupu nami mħɾapas ni mħulis. jaku o mdɾumuʦ bi qməəpaħ kdɟijax. dħuq sŋajan ɟijax do musa ku tuħuj laqi ni laqi laqi, malu bi ka ɟijax saw nii sblaiq balaj waħ.
S.FORM: = Sblaiq = Sblaiq mu. Dhuq sngayan jiyax ka sayang, mqaras bi ka lnglungan mu, yasa tduwa pqita ku laqi laqi, mseupu nami mhrapas ni mhulis. Yaku o mdrumuc bi qmeepah kdjiyax. Dhuq sngayan jiyax do musa ku tuhuy laqi ni laqi laqi, malu bi ka jiyax saw nii sblaiq balay wah.
S.PHON: = sblaiq = sblaiq mu. dħuq sŋajan ɟijax ka sajaŋ, mqaɾas bi ka lŋluŋan mu, jasa tduwa pqita ku laqi laqi, msəupu nami mħɾapas ni mħulis. jaku o mdɾumuʦ bi qməəpaħ kdɟijax. dħuq sŋajan ɟijax do musa ku tuħuj laqi ni laqi laqi, malu bi ka ɟijax saw nii sblaiq balaj waħ.
